rag_notes: Top player insight: max speed is often correct for Garchomp — dropping speed means opposing Garchomps and admin spreads can outpace you, which loses games.

expect.role_notes: Should invest heavily in Speed and Attack. Protect expected in doubles. Mega form viable.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Incineroar lost Knock Off in Champions. Core support role with Fake Out + Parting Shot + Intimidate. Common lead with Trick Room setters like Farigiraf.

expect.role_notes: Should not max Speed. Bulk investment expected. Fake Out and Parting Shot are core moves.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Charizardite Y is dominant for sun-based special attacking. Charizardite X used in Trick Room teams. Dual mega teams often run 70-80% primary mega usage.

expect.role_notes: Should hold a Mega Stone. Set should reflect the chosen Mega form — Y favors special moves, X favors physical.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Tyranitar provides Sand Stream support. Icy Wind is a valuable speed control option. Does not always need to Mega evolve.

expect.role_notes: Sand Stream is the preferred ability. Should invest in bulk. Icy Wind or Rock Slide for spread damage.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Farigiraf is a top Trick Room setter. Armor Tail blocks Fake Out which protects Trick Room setup. Common lead with Incineroar.

expect.role_notes: Should minimize Speed investment for Trick Room. Armor Tail blocks priority moves. Mental Herb protects against Taunt.

rag_notes: Top player insight: 5 Speed EVs to edge out opposing Kingambit in mirror matchups. Supreme Overlord gets stronger as teammates faint. Sucker Punch as priority.

expect.role_notes: Supreme Overlord is core ability. Should include Sucker Punch for priority. A few Speed EVs to win mirror matchup.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Prankster gives priority to status moves including Tailwind and Trick Room. Versatile speed control option that can run either.

expect.role_notes: Prankster is the required ability. Should include Tailwind or Trick Room. Icy Wind also viable for speed control.

rag_notes: Top player insight: One of the fastest Pokemon in the format. Clear Body prevents stat drops from Intimidate. Strong special coverage.

expect.role_notes: Clear Body protects from Intimidate. Should max Speed. Strong Ghost and Dragon coverage expected.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Corviknight provides Tailwind support with high physical bulk. Mirror Armor reflects stat drops back at the opponent.

expect.role_notes: Should invest in bulk over Speed. Tailwind is a required move. Mirror Armor punishes Intimidate users.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Mega Scizor is a bulky Technician user. Bullet Punch as priority STAB. Can also set Tailwind.

expect.role_notes: Should hold Scizorite. Bullet Punch is a core priority move. Technician boosts low-BP moves. Bulk investment expected.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Rotom-W with Levitate provides Water and Electric coverage. Volt Switch for momentum. Difficult to hit with Ground moves.

expect.role_notes: Levitate is the only ability. Volt Switch for pivoting expected. Should include Electric and Water coverage.

rag_notes: Top player insight: Mega Meganium is a Champions-exclusive Mega. Support role with healing and status moves. Leaf Guard protects from status in sun.

expect.role_notes: Should hold Meganiumite for Mega form. Bulk investment expected. Support moves like healing or status expected alongside Grass STAB.
